title: [lichen_l2.c:1071-1075] peer_table clear loop does not zero last_seen or padding
description:
Completeness: Memory safety category - secure_zero not applied to all fields.

In lichen_l2_enable() disable path (line 1071-1075), the peer_table clear loop zeros pubkey and eui64 via secure_zero(), but does not clear:
1. last_seen (int64_t) - contains timing information that could leak peer activity
2. Potential padding bytes between fields

While last_seen is not cryptographic material, it leaks when peers were last active, which is timing side-channel information. The enable path at line 1319 uses memset(peer_table, 0, sizeof(peer_table)) which does clear everything but is not secure_zero().

Fix: Use secure_zero on entire entry, or add last_seen = 0 after setting active = false.
close_reason: Fixed: Added last_seen = 0 to peer_table clear loop to zero timing information
